problem_statement: Mock BRD problem statement: The current settlement reconciliation process relies on manual matching of transaction records across three disparate systems, resulting in an average 5-day resolution cycle for discrepancies. This creates significant operational risk, regulatory exposure, and customer dissatisfaction when payment delays cascade into downstream obligations.
root_causes: Lack of a unified transaction identifier across the core ledger, payments gateway, and reporting warehouse.
Manual export-import workflows between systems with no automated exception flagging.
Absence of real-time event streaming means discrepancies are only detected in end-of-day batch runs.
No single source of truth for settlement status, leading to duplicated effort across operations teams.
